purpose: F-axis CPU superlimit synthetic 4-path Φ cross measurement — minimal pre-H100 signal. Cost $0, CPU-only on Mac / htz, no real weights, no GPU.
raw_strict: hexa-only · deterministic · IEEE 754 canonical float · no Python · no GPU · no real weight download · seed fixed

seeds.note: Hex 0xCA75E{1..4} decoded to decimal so stage0 can consume without 0x prefix parsing.

synthetic_ckpt.eigenvalue_profile: 1.0, 0.9375, 0.875, ... decreasing 0.0625 step, floor 0.01 (mirror of tool/phi_extractor_ffi_wire.hexa fixture_eigenvalues)
synthetic_ckpt.lora_mock_populate: deterministic LCG (a=1664525, c=1013904223, m=2^31-1) seeded by path.seed

phi_formula.phi_raw_definition: sum_{k=1..eigen_dim} lambda_k · ||e_k||^2 · (1 + lora_energy / (1 + lora_energy))  — bounded [0,1] saturation on LoRA energy; isolates eigen-basis dominant contribution while mixing mock LoRA signal.
phi_formula.lora_energy_definition: mean(e_k · v_lora_k) over rank r; v_lora_k = LCG draw normalized to unit-norm
phi_formula.capacity_normalization: phi_normalized = phi_raw (NO-OP in synthetic — we do not subsample; SSOT spec §3 step 3 capacity_normalization applies only to real subsampled H100 run). params_billion / baseline_billion ratio is still recorded for provenance and H100-correlate sanity check.
phi_formula.batch_size: small (rank × eigen_dim dot products; ~1024 scalar ops per path)

conditions: ALL_PAIRS ratio < 0.10 (synthetic mock allows looser bound per §4 interpretation matrix; H100 real gate stays < 0.05)

notes.synthetic_vs_trained: synthetic Φ is NOT a surrogate for trained Φ. Provides measurement-floor + path-dependent geometric bias only (per proposal §1 core_hypothesis).
notes.idempotency: tool is idempotent — rerun yields byte-identical JSON. seed/eigenvalue profile fixed.
notes.budget_wallclock_seconds: under 5 seconds on M2/M3/ax102 CPU (~32 kiB f64 workspace).
